meanings.definition: to move or force, especially in an effort to get something open; :
examples: Raccoons managed to pry the lid off the garbage pail
Don't pry into my personal matters!

meanings.definition: search or inquire in a meddlesome way
examples: This guy is always nosing around the office

meanings.definition: make an uninvited or presumptuous inquiry
examples: They pried the information out of him
he flipped through my letters in his nosy way
the snoopy neighbor watched us all day
